scope_note: Full re-audit of Ralph→/goal addition (2026-05-15). Five surfaces: platform claims, citation evidence ladder, skill references, prompt mechanics, URL liveness.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Verify capabilities BEFORE asserting, not after.
Practitioner observation beats docs lookup / live-test beats docs for runtime-behavior claims.
Known correct Claude Code facts (easy to get wrong).
Sessions are the unit of work — write 'start a new session in X,' not 'open Claude Code in X.'
Source URL + type label — mandatory. Scope: maintainer-block only.
Source-verification maintainer block on any student-facing file with practitioner citations.
Skills by name, never by path.
Marker syntax {{prompt:<key>}} resolves to registry file.
Name the consumer at write time; chain-by-back-reference.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt references 'the skill you authored at Module 6, in ~/.claude/skills/' without concrete skill name. Maintainer acknowledges as TODO: switch to 'the skill in ~/.claude/skills/ you authored at Module 6' if sim flags ambiguity. Non-blocking — fresh session has CLAUDE.local.md and .claude/memory/ with prior context.

platform_claims_checked.claim: Claude Code shipped `/goal`. The runtime version of the same move. A condition, a check each turn.
Ask it to enter plan mode and design the next iteration of the loop. [body prose]
Enable plan mode. [prompt instruction — instructional, not a platform assertion about invocation affordance]
.claude/memory/ [prompt artefact location — confirmed AE101 student-repo construct per training-architecture.md]
the SKILL.md of the skill you authored at Module 6, in `~/.claude/skills/` [personal skill location]

citations_checked.claim: Geoffrey Huntley saw a lever [body — practitioner named in voice, no inline URL per §1 body-scope rule]
Geoffrey Huntley, Ralph Loop — [practitioner direct], https://ghuntley.com/ralph/ (2025-07-14, historical foundational, outside 6-month window, explicitly labeled)
/goal live-verified against Claude Code 2.1.142 — source-verification block

_note: Ralph→/goal section added 2026-05-15. /goal confirmed live against Claude Code 2.1.142 (bash: claude -p '/goal test condition' executes; maintainer block records no-arg variant returns usage hint). Huntley URL live (HTTP 200). Body claim 'a check each turn' is observable-behavior-only; worker/judge model split explicitly NOT claimed in body (maintainer block records that as un-live-tested). One TODO: prompt back-reference to M6 skill lacks concrete name — acknowledged in maintainer block, non-blocking pending sim results.
